history.content:
<thought>
I am facing right and there is open space directly ahead. The goal is to the lower-right, so moving forward will bring me closer while avoiding the lava below.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right and the path ahead is clear. Moving forward advances me toward the goal while staying on the safe row above the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side of the upper corridor, facing right, and there is a wall directly ahead. To continue toward the goal below, I need to turn downward first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down and the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. To avoid the lava, I should turn left to face the open cell on the left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am back at the upper-right corridor, facing right into a wall. To reach the goal, I need to go down from here, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down again, and moving forward would step into lava. I need to reorient toward the open path, so I will turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Facing right here would hit the wall, and the path to the goal is below through the open route. I should turn right to face down again.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly ahead is the goal `G`, so the best action is to move forward into it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down in the cell above the goal. Moving forward would step onto the goal cell, so I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
